summary: Completed-goal candidate goals are now actionable draft sources: opennori draft --from-next-candidate converts a selected candidate into a draft Nori Contract with ACCEPTANCE-BASIS as the current gap, preserves source goal/candidate/user value/risks in acceptance_basis, and refuses sources that are not ready-for-next-loop.
reviewability: Rerun the listed tests and run the draft command against the completed opennori-self goal; inspect the generated draft acceptance basis and current_gap.
limitations: This proves candidate-to-draft behavior for completed goals in the current repository; the generated draft still requires user approval before implementation or evidence can complete the next loop.
